---
title: "Hi, I'm Nadhira! 👋"
about:
  template: solana
  image: profile.jpg
  image-width: 24em
  image-shape: round
---

```{=html}
<style>
#about-block {
  text-align: right;
}
.entity-contents {
  text-align: right;
}
.about-links {
  justify-content: flex-end !important;
}
.quarto-about-solana.column-body {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 75% !important;
  grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  padding-top: 6em !important;
  padding-left: 3em;
  padding-right: 3em;
}
.about-entity {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}
.about-contents {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  flex: 1 1 0 !important;
}
</style>
```

::: {#about-block}
I'm currently studying Quantitative Methods in the Social Sciences at Columbia University. Before that, I worked as a data analyst at Traveloka and OCBC. I'm drawn to causal inference and data analysis as tools for addressing questions in developing economies and emerging markets, and this is where I write about what I'm learning along the way.

[**See My Projects** →](blog.qmd){.learn-more}
:::
